hero.alt: Logistics AI dashboard showing customer support automation, order tracking, and conversation analytics

orderManagement.alt: Comprehensive Order Management & Support - Instant resolution of order inquiries, modifications, tracking, and installations

peakHours.alt: Peak and Off-Hours Management - 24/7 availability to handle off-hours and high-volume spikes

escalation.alt: Escalation & Human Handoff Coordination - Seamless escalation to human agents with full context and real-time alerts

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thank you for calling SwiftMove Logistics. I’m your AI support assistant, here to help with shipment tracking, delivery updates, and issue resolution — twenty four seven. How can I assist you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I want to check the status of my shipment.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Sure. Could you please share your tracking number?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, it’s S M four five eight nine two one.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you. Please give me a moment while I check the details.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Your shipment is currently in transit and has reached the Ranchi distribution hub.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: The estimated delivery is tomorrow by six p.m.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you like me to send real time updates via SMS or WhatsApp?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, WhatsApp would be good.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Done. You’ll receive automated updates on WhatsApp until the package is delivered.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can assist you with — like rescheduling delivery, address changes, or reporting an issue?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I might not be available tomorrow. Can I reschedule?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Of course. Would you like delivery the day after tomorrow, or this weekend?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: This weekend.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. I’ve successfully rescheduled your delivery for Saturday.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’ll receive a confirmation message shortly.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: If any issue arises, I can instantly escalate it to a human agent with full context.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thanks.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. Thank you for choosing SwiftMove Logistics. Have a great day.
